title: GWI POS Artifact Manifest
description: Captures version information for all key software components on the node. Written by the Stage 11 post-run step. Lives at /opt/gwi-pos/state/artifact-manifest.json. Used for fleet-wide version tracking, rollout verification, and deprecation detection (APP_VERSION_OLD, BASELINE_VERSION_OLD). Example: {"schema_version":"1.0","producer":"11-system-hardening.sh","generated_at":"2026-03-20T14:35:00Z","node_id":"nuc-venue-001","baseline_version":"baseline-2026.03.20.1","app_commit_sha":"abc1234","baseline_commit_sha":"def5678","ansible_core_version":"2.15.0","installer_version":"11.0","packages":{"postgresql":"14.10","nodejs":"20.11.0","chromium-browser":"122.0.6261.69"}}

producer.description: Name of the script that wrote this file.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this file was written.

node_id.description: Unique node identifier from SERVER_NODE_ID in .env.

app_commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the deployed application code.

baseline_commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the baseline/installer code.

ansible_core_version.description: Version of ansible-core installed on the node.

installer_version.description: Version of the installer script (number of stages or semver).

packages.description: Key package names mapped to their installed versions. Must include at minimum: postgresql, nodejs, chromium-browser (or chromium).
